about.subtitle: Who we are
about.title: Honest and Precise Assembly
about.p1: We are JML mont s.r.o., a company founded by two brothers with a shared vision. We lead a team of experienced fitters specializing in steel structures, fire extinguishing systems, and technological units.
about.p2: Our calling card is reliability and a responsible approach. We complete every project so that it works 100%, ensuring our customers can always rely on us.
about.p3: We are based in Třebíč, Czech Republic, but operate throughout Europe. We welcome both new collaborations and long-term partnerships.
about.stat1_desc: Successfully completed projects with maximum precision.
about.stat2_desc: We assemble all over Europe, from our hometown across borders.

references.ref1_desc: Precise welds on steel structures with maximum accuracy.
references.ref2_desc: We provide complete assembly of halls and racking systems throughout Europe.
references.ref3_desc: Assembly work on steel structures using mountaineering techniques.

career.subtitle: Career at JML mont
career.title: We are looking for you
career.desc: We are expanding our team! We are looking for reliable partners for assembly work across Europe. We offer fair treatment, stable work, and a great team.
career.btn: I want to join the team

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: If you are looking for an assembly company that keeps its word and works hard, get in touch – we'd love to hear from you.
contact.msg_success: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.

seo.title: JML mont | Industrial Assembly and Steel Structures
seo.description: Reliable industrial assembly, steel structures, and technological units across Europe. JML mont s.r.o. - precision and quality.
